# Sedulo Digital — Claude Design Ingestion File
# Generated by Sedulo Digital Brand Playbook v1.0
# SEDULO-PLAYBOOK-VERSION: 1.0

## How to use this bundle
Drop this entire folder into Claude Design at claude.ai/design.
This file is your starting context. Read all referenced files before generating any designs.

## Project Summary
Sedulo Digital is a Dallas-based boutique digital agency founded by Clyde Cross. We build websites, SEO foundations, and AI tools for small business owners who are skilled at their craft but behind online. Every client works with Clyde directly. The brand is bold, minimal, and modern — built on near-black, warm off-white, and a single dusty gold accent.

## Primary Design Goal
Build the sedulodigital.com marketing site. Start with the homepage. All 5 pages are defined: Homepage, About, Services, Learn, Contact.

## Stack
Next.js + Tailwind CSS

## Brand Personality in 5 Words
Diligent. Grounded. Confident. Direct. Trustworthy.

## What Makes This Brand Visually Distinct
Near-black and warm off-white as the primary palette with a single dusty gold accent used exactly once per screen. 1px black hairline frames replace drop shadows as the elevation cue. No gradients, no decorative effects, no rounded corners above 6px. The restraint is intentional — the design itself signals competence.

## File Reading Order
1. brand-tokens.css — load all design tokens first
2. color-system.md — understand color roles and usage rules
3. typography.md — load font stack and scale
4. components.md — understand component patterns
5. copy-context.md — load voice, audience, and offer context
6. page-architecture.md — understand page structure before generating screens

## Critical Rules
- Never use placeholder copy — use real copy from copy-context.md and page-architecture.md
- Never deviate from the color palette in brand-tokens.css
- Never use fonts outside the defined type stack
- Every CTA must match the voice tone in copy-context.md
- All spacing must reference the scale in brand-tokens.css
- No em dashes anywhere in any generated copy or UI text
- One accent moment per screen maximum

## First Prompt to Run After Ingestion
"Using the brand system in this bundle, generate a high-fidelity homepage mockup for Sedulo Digital. Start with the Hero section. Use the headline and copy from page-architecture.md. Apply the full color palette and typography stack from the token file. Do not use any placeholder text — all copy is provided in the bundle."
